Popular Tour Packages

Handpicked adventures designed to showcase best of Bohol's natural wonders and cultural heritage

⭐ FeaturedIsland Hopping

Panglao Island Hopping

Explore Balicasag Island, snorkel with sea turtles, and visit the stunning Virgin Island sandbar.

Full Day Max 10
For as Low as₱3,500

⭐ FeaturedAdventure

Dolphin & Whale Watching

Early morning dolphin watching cruise with Pamilacan Island snorkeling adventure.

Half Day Max 8
For as Low as₱3,000
View
⭐ FeaturedWildlife

Philippine Tarsier Sanctuary

Get up close with the world's smallest primate in their natural rainforest habitat.

Half Day Max 12
For as Low as₱2,500

MUST VISIT PLACES

Iconic Destinations

Explore Bohol's most breathtaking attractions that have captivated travelers from around the world.

Carmen, Bohol

Chocolate Hills

The Chocolate Hills are Bohol's most famous landmark. Over 1,268 perfectly cone-shaped hills spread across 50 square kilometers.
